next_best_action: Investigate Dell Latitude 5520 with 100% disk usage. Check for failing drive, excessive indexing, or runaway processes causing constant disk I/O.

Verify Windows Search indexer is not stuck in a rebuild loop
Check for pending Windows updates that may be causing disk thrashing
If disk is failing, arrange replacement and data migration

next_best_action: Investigate HP LaserJet on Floor 5 showing false paper jam error. Clear any sensor obstructions and reset the printer.
remediation_steps: Physically inspect the HP LaserJet on Floor 5 near the kitchen for paper debris or sensor obstructions
Open all paper tray compartments and the rear access panel to check for stuck paper
Clean the paper jam sensors with compressed air
Power cycle the printer (full shutdown, wait 30 seconds, restart)
If paper jam error persists after clearing, schedule a service call

next_best_action: URGENT: Production database connection pool is exhausted, causing 503 errors on customer-facing APIs affecting ~200 clients. Investigate max_connections limit and failed auto-scaling.
remediation_steps: Immediately assess scope: confirm which APIs are returning 503 errors
Check database server max_connections setting and current active connections
Identify queries holding connections open (long-running queries, uncommitted transactions)
Kill idle/stuck connections to free pool capacity as an immediate mitigation
Investigate why auto-scaler failed to increase pool beyond 100 connections
Increase max_connections on the database server if hardware allows
Review connection pool configuration (timeout, max idle, eviction policy)

Run Office repair tool (Quick Repair first, then Online Repair if needed)
Check available system memory and disk space on the user's device

If issue persists, consider rolling back to the previous Office version

next_best_action: Investigate VPN connection failure with 'Unable to resolve gateway address' error for remote user on GlobalProtect v6.1.
remediation_steps: Verify the VPN gateway DNS record is resolving correctly
Check if the user's ISP or home router is blocking VPN traffic
Have the user try flushing DNS cache (ipconfig /flushdns) and reconnecting
Test with an alternative DNS server (e.g., 8.8.8.8) to rule out DNS issues
If DNS resolves correctly, check GlobalProtect client logs for connection errors
